title: cli-agents-bridge session manifest v2
description: On-disk JSON shape of ~/.claude/cli-agents-bridge/sessions/<id>/manifest.json. Trimmed YAGNI per PLAN §4.3.

sessionId.description: SC-4 regex. 8 hex chars produced by generateSessionID in Sprint 1.

schemaVersion.description: v1 read with ApplyV1Defaults; writes always emit 2.

projectPath.description: Absolute path of the session's working directory. RC-3 rejects '..' during migrate.

role.description: Routing role (BUG-3). 'neutral' is the v1-read default.

pid.description: Process ID of the registering Claude Code session. 0 = legacy v1 read (no live PID inferable).

lastHeartbeat.description: Refreshed every cfg.HeartbeatTickMs by Manager.StartHeartbeat (BUG-1) or on demand via Manager.Touch (BUG-9).

status.description: MVP uses only 'active'. v0.3+ may add idle/paused/terminating.

capabilities.description: Informational capability tags. Routing does not consult these yet (Sprint 2+ candidate).
